intent: A small note-taking single-page app. Users can write notes in a textarea, save them to a list below, and switch between light mode and dark mode with a toggle in the header.
features: write a note in the textarea and save with the Add button
rendered notes appear in a list below the input
notes: Vanilla HTML + JS. The dark-mode toggle is a primary feature, not a nice-to-have. Pattern: a button in the header that flips a class on body or sets a data-theme attribute, with CSS variables driving the colors.
